Some call preparation that will guarantee you success with cold calling. First, understand that inside sales is very different from traditional just cold call blitz telemarketing. The difference is inside sales is much more strategic than just calling names off of any list. What are they interested in? What do their ads look like? What are their jingles? What are they always talking about? What are their problems? What problems are they trying to solve?
